title: Child Ortho Care — Dr. Nargesh Agrawal | Pediatric Orthopedic Specialist in Delhi
heading: Hope in every correction.
description: Specialized pediatric orthopedic care by Dr. Nargesh Agrawal. Clubfoot, hip dysplasia, limb deformities, scoliosis, and more. Located at C-7, Ground Floor, D-Park, Model Town-3, New Delhi 110009.
text: Child Ortho Care — Dr. Nargesh Agrawal | Pediatric Orthopedic Specialist in Delhi Dr. Nargesh Agrawal Pediatric Orthopedic Specialist Home About Services Conditions Blog Testimonials Contact Book Consultation Specialized Orthopedic Care for Children Hope in every correction. Dr. Nargesh Agrawal is a trusted pediatric orthopedic surgeon in Delhi, providing compassionate care for clubfoot, hip dysplasia, limb deformities, cerebral palsy, and more. Book a Consultation WhatsApp Us Mon–Sat 8AM–8PM C-7, Ground Floor, D-Park , Model Town-3 +91 8851777145 ✓ Pediatric Specialist Trained for tiny bones Reply within 24 hours What We Treat Specialised Pediatric Conditions From birth deformities to growing-pain concerns, every condition gets a child-first approach. Clubfoot Ponseti method, casting, bracing Learn more → Hip Dysplasia (DDH) Early diagnosis, harness, surgery Learn more → Bowlegs & Knock Knees Growth modulation, alignment Learn more → Cerebral Palsy Spasticity, gait, posture care Learn more → Scoliosis Bracing, monitoring, surgical correction Learn more → Limb Lengthening Discrepancy correction Learn more → Rickets Vitamin D, deformity correction Learn more → Perthes Disease Hip preservation, monitoring Learn more → View All 18 Conditions 100% Pediatric focus Every appointment, every plan, every follow-up — designed for kids. Meet Your Doctor Compassionate ortho care by Dr. Nargesh Agrawal At Child Ortho Care, we are dedicated to specialised orthopedic treatment for infants, children, and adolescents. Founded and led by Dr. Nargesh Agrawal , a renowned pediatric orthopedic surgeon, our centre offers compassionate, advanced care for clubfoot, limb deformities, hip dysplasia, pediatric fractures, and neuromuscular disorders. Whether you're seeking a second opinion, an early diagnosis, or specialised treatment for your child, we're with you every step of the way. Read Full Bio Why Families Choose Us A clinic built around the child, not the chart 01 Pediatric-only Practice Every surgical and non-surgical decision is tuned for growing bones, not adapted from adult orthopedics. 02 Conservative First Most cases — clubfoot, knock knees, bowlegs, mild scoliosis — start with bracing, casting, or physiotherapy. Surgery is the last lever, not the first. 03 Family-friendly Workflow Same-day diagnostics where possible. Clear paperwork. WhatsApp follow-ups. Reception that speaks Hindi and English. 04 International Patient Desk Travel coordination, visa support, accommodation, airport pickup, and online follow-ups for families flying in. Your Journey From concern to confident steps — in four moves Step 01 Reach Out Phone, WhatsApp, or the form. Our team responds within 24 hours. → Step 02 Consultation Detailed assessment with Dr. Nargesh — clear diagnosis, parents-first. → Step 03 Treatment Plan Conservative first. Surgery only when needed. Family at the centre. → Step 04 Recovery & Follow-up Structured rehab and periodic checks for long-term outcomes. From the Blog Parent guides & clinical insights Plain-English answers to the questions parents actually ask in clinic.
